titleStmt.title: SII 24.422: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 422. (A.R. No. 3 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of 800 poṉ by Periya Kōṉammaṉ, wife of Periya Tirumalaidēva Mahārāja, son of Salakkaiyadēva Mahārāja of the Sūrya-vaṁśa, out of the interest of which Śrīvaishṇavas were to be fed daily at Kandāḍai Aṇṇaṉ Appaṉ tirumāḷigai. The details of date viz. Śaka 1457, Manmatha, Dhanus, śu. 8, Thursday, Rēvati correspond to 1535 A.D., December 2, Thursday; ·42; f.d.n., ·99.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vira Aścutadevamahārāyar prathivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 7- Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa manmatasamvatsarattu dhanunāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu AṣṭamiyumStands for yum bṛhaspativāramum peṟṟarevatinakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉka
rai pāṇḍikulāśanivaḷanāṭṭu perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevatku śrīmatmahāmaṇḍale śvararāna sūryavamśa salakkaiyadevamahārājāvin putran periyatirumalai devamahārājāvin teviyāt periyakoṉammāḷ taṉmamāka poliyūṭṭukku samarppitta ḷa 8 100 Inta poṉ Eṇṇūttukkum vaṭṭi nūṟṟukku Iraṇṭu paṇam viḻuk
(k)kāṭu māsam Oṉṟukku vaṭṭi kūṭiṉa ḷa 6 10Must be 16 i.e. 10 6Āka varuṣam 1kku vaṭṭi ḷa 100 9 10 2kku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷukiṟa taḷikai Oṉṟukku tiruvaraṅka tevanāl Amutupaṭi § U paruppamutu n=ta ney Amutu n=ta kaṟi Amutu kompil Añcu koṭiyil Añcu Ituvum palacampāramum Uḷpaṭa taḷikai Oṉṟukku nāḷ 1- kku U 1pa Ākak kaṭṭa
ḷai Iṭṭa taḷikai 5kku U pu 5(1/4) Āka varuṣam 1kku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 100 9 10 2kkum Inta vaṭṭiyile cari Āka ṉāḷtoṟum perumāḷ Amutuceytaruḷi nipattakkaṭṭaḷaikku cuṟṟa maruvāti viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālattoṉṟukku taḷikai Oṉṟum piracātam Irunāḻiyum vātukkulagotrattu Ābhastambasūtrattu kovilk
kantāṭai Aṇṇaṉ Appaṉ tirumāḷikaiyile Ācandrārkkastāyi Āka san=tāna paramparai Āka śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷ Amutu ceyyumpaṭikkuc kuṭuttuvarakkaṭavatākavum . Inta poliyūṭṭukku śilāśāsanam Eḻutinamaikku kovil kaṇakku śrīraṅga nārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.422 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
